As of 2026-06-01 20:30 CST（盘后）, the Company signed an LOI with Redlake Micro Devices (Qingdao) Co., Ltd. for a 65% equity acquisition; this constitutes 内幕信息 under the Securities Law and is not yet disclosed on the SSE.

Per SSE Listing Rules and CSRC guidance, selective disclosure to analysts or business partners is prohibited; insiders（董事、监事、高管、信息披露义务人及其近亲属）are in blackout from T-10 to T+2 trading days around the first 临时公告 and must be recorded on the 内幕信息知情人登记表.
Draft LOI financials (unaudited): Q3 run-rate RMB 1.24b; synergy program “Project Yunlu” targets August closing, subject to CSRC 备案 and any SZSE review if cross-listing implications arise.

To: Board Risk Committee; From: Ms. Zhao Min, Compliance Director (zhao.min@hongyuan-lattice.cn); cc: Mr. Liang Ke, CFO.
Subject: 重大资产重组预案筹备与内幕信息管理; Date: 2026-06-01.
As of 2026-06-01 20:30 CST（盘后）, the Company signed an LOI with Redlake Micro Devices (Qingdao) Co., Ltd. for a 65% equity acquisition; this constitutes 内幕信息 under the Securities Law and is not yet disclosed on the SSE.
Per SSE Listing Rules and CSRC guidance, selective disclosure to analysts or business partners is prohibited; insiders（董事、监事、高管、信息披露义务人及其近亲属）are in blackout from T-10 to T+2 trading days around the first 临时公告 and must be recorded on the 内幕信息知情人登记表.
Issuer-relative materiality assessment indicates the transaction would increase 2026 revenue by approximately 18.7% versus 2025 audited figures, meeting our 信息披露管理制度 “重大事项” threshold.
Public-status check: the 2026-05-20 临时公告 on pilot line commissioning (http://info.s se.com/ann?doc=20 26-05-20-0001) is already public and covered by broad press; TechSphere Weekly’s recap adds no new facts and is stale.
Draft LOI financials (unaudited): Q3 run-rate RMB 1.24b; synergy program “Project Yunlu” targets August closing, subject to CSRC 备案 and any SZSE review if cross-listing implications arise.
Do not transmit personal information to offshore diligence vendors until CAC 跨境数据安全评估 is cleared; exclude data of natural persons under 14 per PIPL; current samples indicate no minors collected.
Employment workflow note: two candidate rosters from Redlake include names, mobile numbers, and Resident ID No. 44 19 2* * * * * 0 93 X; mask IDs and phone digits before internal circulation; hr-check@hongyuan-lattice.cn will coordinate minimization.
Counterparty identifiers: Redlake provisional USCC 91 20 8X2 0 0 Q 0 3 5 9; treat as confidential and do not upload to external VDRs until NDAs are executed.
Internal-only project management update: jira sprint-18 milestones were shifted by three days; this is routine and not material to the Issuer.
Note: last week’s press release about VoltArc sensors and the generic product sheet for “Nimbus-7 Controller” are operational updates and do not constitute MNPI or a MAC.
Trading prohibition: all designated insiders, including Mr. Liang, must refrain from trading the Company’s A shares until the first 临时公告 is released before the next trading day’s 开盘 per 信息披露准则第6条.
Procedural timeline: finalize board resolution draft by 06/03; if market rumors emerge on 微博/雪球, promptly 核查 and issue a 澄清公告; if leakage is suspected, consider 重大事项停牌.
Public-filing reference: the 2025 Annual Report (SSE link id=20 25/AR/003) already disclosed the Tianzhuo JV termination; treat it as public information.
Cross-border consideration: any transfer of code repositories containing employee commit metadata must undergo data mapping and PIA; remove personal tags and enforce pseudonymization before trial exports.
For questions or incident reporting, contact compliance@hongyuan-lattice.cn; project room URL https://intra.hylp.cn/p/PR OJ-Y U N L U/; attachments include SPA term sheet v0.3 (no personal data) and vendor security checklist.
